mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.contact_id, COALESCE(u.username, c.nickname) AS username, COALESCE(u.email, c.email) AS email, c.nickname, c.group_name, c.created_at FROM contacts c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.contact_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contacts (owner_id, contact_id, email, nickname, group_name, created_at) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{contactId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{groupName}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM contacts WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.contact_id, COALESCE(u.username, c.nickname) AS username, COALESCE(u.email, c.email) AS email, c.nickname, c.group_name, c.created_at FROM contacts c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.contact_id = u.id WHERE c.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY COALESCE(u.username, c.nickname) LIMIT 10
